title: abrotanella rosulata
intro: Abrotanella rosulata is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Asteraceae, and is also known as New Zealand button daisy. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Abrotanella rosulata include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Abrotanella rosulata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects.
